users.name: Gopal Swamy
users.location: Anantapur Oil Extraction Depot, Andhra Pradesh

products.title: Swadeshi Premium Foxtail Millets (Grade A)
products.description: 100% organic, unpolished, high-fiber Foxtail Millets sourced directly from dryland farmers in Medchal. Authentically graded as premium Grade A using Google Vertex AI AutoML computer vision for maximum purity and zero-middleman trust routing.
products.specifications: Weight: 1 Kg | Moisture: 8.9% | Grade A Certified | Vertex AI AutoML Certificate VA-992

products.title: Organic Foxtail Millets (Korralu)
products.description: 100% organic, unpolished, high-fiber Foxtail Millets sourced directly from dryland farmers in Medchal. Perfect alternative to white rice with rich mineral content, gluten-free, and suitable for diabetic wellness diets.
products.specifications: Weight: 1 Kg | BIS Certified | HSN Code: 1008.21.10 | Moisture: <12% | No synthetic pesticide residue.

products.title: Wood-Pressed Cold Groundnut Oil
products.description: Traditionally extracted cold-pressed groundnut oil using native wooden Ghani blocks. No heat treatment, chemicals, or solvent extraction. Retains full nutty flavor, high monounsaturated fats, and vitamins for heart-healthy Indian cooking.
products.specifications: Volume: 1 Litre | FSSAI Registered | HSN Code: 1508.90.10 | Zero Trans-Fat | Rich in Vitamin E.

products.title: Premium Hand-Ground Salem Turmeric
products.description: Salem-grade organic turmeric powder with high natural curcumin content (above 5.5%). Sourced from single-origin cooperative farms in South India, sun-dried, and traditionally stone-ground to preserve immunity-boosting benefits.
products.specifications: Weight: 250g | Curcumin Content: 5.8% | HSN Code: 0910.30.20 | Pure vegetarian, no starch or coloring additives.

products.title: Organic Wood-Pressed Sesame Oil
products.description: Authentic wood-pressed sesame (til) oil with high nutritional density. Sun-dried sesame seeds are crushed with palm jaggery in a wooden press to balance bitterness, providing a rich aroma and deep golden tint perfect for traditional curries and body massages.
products.specifications: Volume: 1 Litre | Cold Filtered | HSN Code: 1515.50.91 | Saturated Fats: 14% | Hand-processed.

auditLogs.details: Calibrated platform convenience fee to 2.5% to comply with national DPI routing rules. Split ratios recalculated.
Approved Swadeshi Merchant enrollment for "Krishna Organic Millets & Grains" after physical Mandi audit and FSSAI link validation.
Activated zero-retention audit flags for rider Alapati Harish. Masked Aadhaar coordinates verified with UIDAI live-gate.
Admin verified shipping coordinates override for BC-ORD-HIST-1002. Escrow released to merchant VPA saikrishna@ybl.
Approved registered role credentials and e-KYC documents for Shri Amitabh Kant (CEO) (ADMIN). Set Trust Score to 98%.
